props.title: Safety First, Always
props.description: Safety is not just a priority—it's our core value. Every decision, every action, every project begins with the safety and well-being of our team, clients, and communities.

cards.title: Zero Incident Goal
cards.description: Our ultimate goal is zero workplace incidents. We maintain rigorous safety protocols and continuous improvement processes to protect every team member.

cards.title: OSHA Compliance
cards.description: Full compliance with OSHA regulations and industry best practices. Our safety program exceeds minimum requirements to ensure the highest level of protection.

cards.title: Daily Safety Briefings
cards.description: Every project begins with job-specific safety planning and daily toolbox talks to address hazards and reinforce safe work practices.

cards.title: Trained Workforce
cards.description: All electricians maintain current certifications including OSHA 30, CPR/First Aid, and specialized training for high-voltage and confined space work.

cards.title: Hazard Prevention
cards.description: Proactive identification and mitigation of electrical hazards through comprehensive job hazard analysis and safety audits.

cards.title: Ongoing Education
cards.description: Continuous safety training programs keep our team updated on the latest safety standards, equipment, and industry practices.
